emotional_tone: Professional, secure, high-performance, and tactical. It feels like a high-end command center for global P2P trading.

layout.spacing_system: Use generous padding: p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers must have internal padding. For marketing pages, use the 'Tetris' grid (asymmetrical, gap-8 to gap-12). For dashboards, use 'Control Room' bento grid (dense, gap-4 to gap-6).
layout.alignment: Mobile-first responsive. Optical alignment over geometrical alignment. Left-align data and forms.
layout.navigation: Sticky header (z-50) using 'Crystal Glass' style (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with a 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10). Explicit CTA for login.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Neumorphic tactile variant: flat background (#171717), sharp 1px border (border-white/10), no soft shadows by default. Use 'Tracing Beam' dynamic glowing border on hover for VIP and core P2P action cards.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: flat backgrounds, 1px borders, high-contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#EAB308]).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.modals: Crystal glass overlays with solid modal backgrounds, sharp borders.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-neutral-800 hover:text-white). Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). Do not use 'transition: all'.
motion_and_interaction.data_viz: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts with color-blind friendly palettes. Apply glowing effects (drop-shadow) to chart lines.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react (default) and @phosphor-icons/react (for high-end duotone elements if needed).

hero_background.description: Abstract blue tech nodes for the landing page hero background. Apply a bg-black/50 overlay.

marketplace_products.description: Cargo shipping containers for the VIP Marketplace section.

p2p_trust.description: Business handshake in a dark setting, representing secure P2P transactions.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='p2p-exchange-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the platform as a hybrid fullstack SaaS.
Create three main zones: Public Landing Page, Client Dashboard (Normal + VIP), and Admin Panel.
Use standard pure HTML+Tailwind for the landing page (Tetris Grid, scroll animations, hero background image).
Use Shadcn UI components for the Dashboard and Admin Panel (Control Room bento grid, dense data tables).
For the VIP marketplace, showcase the 'cargo shipping containers' image.
Ensure all text has a WCAG AA compliant contrast ratio against dark backgrounds.
Implement the P2P flow: select pair, enter amount, show target account, upload screenshot, await admin approval.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
